title: Task
description: A devflow task packet — the planner-emitted unit of work for one node of the wave DAG. Carries the intent, the EXCLUSIVE set of paths this task owns (waves must have pairwise-disjoint owned_paths), its machine-checkable acceptance gate, and the risk/web flags that escalate the verify panel.

id.description: Stable task id, e.g. 'T-001'. Used as the key in run_state.tasks and in journal entries.

intent.description: One-sentence statement of WHAT this task must achieve (not how). The completeness critic compares this against the actual diff.

owned_paths.description: Repo-relative globs/paths this task EXCLUSIVELY owns. The implementer may only edit within these; within a wave they must be pairwise-disjoint across tasks. Shared files (go.mod, types, schema, router, migration index) belong to a serialized single-owner wave.

acceptance.description: The typed, machine-checkable acceptance array (see acceptance.schema.json). This is the objective gate the verify panel replays — it must fully pin the task done-condition.

riskZone.description: true for money-path / auth / migration zones. Forces an always-on security auditor in the write lane and +1 blind verifier in the verify panel.

web.description: true when the change is browser-verifiable. Adds a chrome-devtools runtime verifier (console/network/lighthouse) to the verify panel.

depends_on.description: Optional ids of tasks that must reach INTEGRATED before this one becomes READY (DAG edges).
